name: Artemis
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Artemis is a tide that remembers — Crescent; under Moon; in Cancer; with II High Priestess.
flowText: Artemis is a tide that remembers — Crescent; under Moon; in Cancer; with II High Priestess.

overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: II High Priestess · XVIII The Moon

items.value: II High Priestess · XVIII The Moon

related.name: ☽ Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the tide of psyche — dream mirror, womb of waters, keeper of illusion.

related.name: Chandra
related.teaser: Chandra milk of night — tides breathing thought, dreams drawn in silver.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Oshun
related.teaser: Sacral is the womb of becoming — water’s embrace, desire’s tide, the dance of creation.

related.name: Moonstone

related.name: ♋ Cancer
related.teaser: Cancer is the lunar tide — mother’s embrace, ocean of feeling, mirror of psyche.

related.name: Cups
related.teaser: Ace of Cups is the cup of water — Origin essence — the {flow_noun} offered by the unseen.

related.name: ♆ Neptune
